claim_summary: A Facebook post circulated claiming an Infotrak report showed Fred Matiang'i leading the 2027 presidential race, followed by Kalonzo Musyoka, with William Ruto a distant third.
verdict_detail: Africa Check found no evidence such a poll exists. Infotrak's actual published polls are covered by reputable news outlets and posted on Infotrak's own site/social accounts; no matching release was found. The most recent genuine Infotrak release at the time was a 16 December 2024 perception study on IEBC confidence, unrelated to this claim.
notes: Included here because this is exactly the kind of claim this dashboard exists to help people check against: a plausible-looking, precisely-worded 'poll result' attributed to a real, credible pollster, that never actually happened.
